title: Persistent permission-learning state
description: Per-repo or global persistent state for §8's 'always allow' / 'always deny' decisions. Lives at `<repo>/.atelier/permissions.json` (per-repo) or `~/.atelier/permissions.json` (global). Loaded at session start; per-repo entries take precedence over same-shape global entries. Schema-validated against this file at load.

scope.description: Where this file lives. The harness validates that the value matches the file location.

captured_at.description: When this file was last written. Used for diagnostics; not load-bearing.

always_allow.description: Tool-call shapes that auto-approve. Matches against `schemas/config/permission_shapes.v1.json` groupings.

always_deny.description: Tool-call shapes the harness refuses without prompting. Takes precedence over `always_allow` on conflict.

tool.description: Tool name this entry applies to.

note.description: Optional human note explaining the decision.

shape.description: Shape descriptor matching one of the grouping kinds defined in permission_shapes.v1.json.
